{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323025353667B45B7614B479B576C"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7549846543769469720","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"节奏比较快，不拖沓。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757837736,"group_id":"7549187737992039448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N897mzZ25W3vkBohhLe+d3e72V194ShMd7eDpAJG4drc","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1743191156202249","user_name":"临谣军镇的楚暮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1743191156202249","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549187737992039448","book_info":{"abstract":"顾修的人生跌入谷底：女友嫌贫爱富，投入富二代怀抱，自己送外卖超时被骂，甚至当街受辱，尊严尽碎！
就在他怒火焚心之际，【神级人生选择系统】突然降临！
【选择一：忍气吞声，奖励“乌龟壳”一副！】 【选择二：上前理论，奖励1000元安慰奖！】 【选择三：干他丫的！奖励“神级格斗术”+十万启动资金！】
顾修：“我选三！”
从此，人生开启无限可能模式！ 送外卖触发选择：【抄近路超时】or【救治路边昏倒老人，奖励“神级医术”！】 遭遇商业打压：【跪地求饶】or【强势反击，奖励未来商业机密！】 面对全球危机：【独善其身】or【挺身而出，奖励黑科技图纸！】
昔日鄙夷他的前女友悔恨交加：“顾修，我当初真是瞎了眼…” 曾经羞辱他的富二代跪地求饶：“顾少，求您把我当个屁放了吧…” 各路顶级大佬奉若上宾：“顾先生一句话，定鼎乾坤！”
从籍籍无名的外卖小哥，到富可敌国的商业巨擘，再到暗世界的无冕之王… 顾修只想说：“我能有今天，全靠自己努力…才怪！主要是系统给得太多了！”
这是一段属于都市最强者的传奇，爽就完了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o730ccdf71b870c57c628e545feb3d04b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"吃个红毛丹","author_id":"","book_id":"7549187737992039448","book_name":"送外卖咋了？我的系统超给力","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7549187899070087704","read_count":"18","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"102916"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"43","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,神豪,系统,美食,外卖,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o730ccdf71b870c57c628e545feb3d04b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389633&x-signature=8RsF%2B%2BqYFPP4Llm14nGZgErfHzA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2305012038107422","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read
